title: physalis walteri var. glabra
intro: Physalis walteri var. glabra, also known as the smooth ground cherry, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the nightshade family. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. Consuming the fruit and leaves of the plant can provide various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
